title: Indicative Market Multiple Reference
notes: Multiples are indicative and vary with market cycle, peril, trigger design, model uncertainty, and sponsor quality.
Sovereign issues may benefit from diversification or structuring support, but execution conditions remain market dependent.

bands.label: Tight Market
bands.description: Strong investor demand and stable catastrophe loss environment.

bands.label: Normal Market
bands.description: Typical issuance conditions for many sovereign and insurer transactions.

bands.label: Stressed Market
bands.description: Post-event or volatility periods with reduced risk appetite.
